home.title: SpeakMove — learn a language, earn coins
home.description: Telegram bot for learning languages. Voice dialogues, coins for lessons, payouts to a card. 15 minutes a day.

home.heroH1: Learn a language — earn coins you can cash out to a card.
home.heroLead: Voice dialogues, x2-coin homework and a CEFR-aligned structure — right inside Telegram. English, German, Norwegian. 15 minutes a day.
